_meta.purpose: Emoji pools for Brite Smile Dental Care reviews. Dental-appropriate emojis. Placement controlled by humanizer.js. Probability controlled by profile.json (60%).
rules: Dental context — tooth, smile emojis appropriate here
Never more than 3 emojis in one review
5-star gets expressive emojis, 3-star gets calm ones

combinations._note: Pre-set combinations feel more natural than random picks. Dental-appropriate.
